title: nassauvia pygmaea var. intermedia
intro: Nassauvia pygmaea var. intermedia, also known as the dwarf nassauvia, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Compositae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the dwarf nassauvia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
